skip.title: Skip check

skip_reason.description: Required justification for skipping the %check section

expected-reason.description: Required justification for why this component is expected to fail building.

expensive.title: Expensive to build
expensive.description: Indicates that building this component is expensive and should be carefully considered when scheduling.

tag.description: For overlays that apply to spec tags

value.title: Value
value.description: An exact string value to match in the spec

regex.description: The regular expression to match in the spec

replacement.description: The replacement text to use in the spec

skip-file-filter.description: Disable post-render file filtering for specs with unexpandable macros in Source/Patch tags

includes.description: List of glob patterns specifying additional config files to load

distros.description: Definitions of distros to build for or consume from

components.description: Definitions of components for this project

default-component-config.description: Project-wide default applied to all components before group and component overrides

default-package-config.title: Default package config
default-package-config.description: Project-wide default applied to all binary packages before group and component overrides

package-groups.title: Package groups
package-groups.description: Definitions of package groups for shared binary package configuration

test-suites.title: Test Suites
test-suites.description: Definitions of test suites for this project

lookaside-base-uri.description: Base URI for lookaside cache for this distro

disable-origins.title: Disable origins
disable-origins.description: When true only allow source files from the lookaside cache and do not fall back to configured origins

snapshot.title: Snapshot
snapshot.description: Snapshot timestamp for source code. Set on the distro or group default-component-config only — per-component snapshots are not allowed.

description.description: Human readable description of the distro version

default-component-config.description: Default component config inherited by all components built for this distro

systemd.description: Whether the image runs systemd as its init system

definition.description: Identifies where to find the definition for this image

test-suites.description: List of test suite references that apply to this image

type.title: Origin type

uri.title: URI
uri.description: URI to download the source file from if origin type is 'download'

publish.description: Publishing settings for this binary package

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of this package group

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Explicit list of binary package names that are members of this group

default-package-config.title: Default package config
default-package-config.description: Configuration inherited by all packages in this group

rpm-channel.title: RPM channel
rpm-channel.description: Publish channel for binary packages; overrides the component-level rpm-channel; use 'none' to keep RPMs in the base directory and skip publishing

debuginfo-channel.title: Debuginfo channel
debuginfo-channel.description: Publish channel for debuginfo packages; overrides the component-level debuginfo-channel; use 'none' to keep RPMs in the base directory and skip publishing

channel.description: Deprecated: use 'rpm-channel' instead. Kept for backwards compatibility; falls back to this value when 'rpm-channel' is not set.

default-author-email.description: Default email for synthetic changelog entries and commits

calculation.title: Release calculation
calculation.description: Controls how the Release tag is managed during rendering. Empty or omitted means auto.

hash-type.title: Hash type
hash-type.description: Hash algorithm used for the hash value

type.title: Source Type
type.description: The type of the spec source

path.title: Path
path.description: Path to the spec (if available locally)

upstream-distro.description: Reference to the upstream distro providing the spec

upstream-name.title: Upstream component name
upstream-name.description: Name of the component in the upstream distro

upstream-commit.description: Git commit hash to pin the upstream spec to. Takes priority over snapshot.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the test suite (must match a key in [test-suites])
